robot_close_to_target_center_l2_0.3
features.source:
def f5(s, a):
    target_cx = s[9] + s[17] / 2.0
    target_cy = s[10] + s[18] / 2.0
    dx = s[0] - target_cx
    dy = s[1] - target_cy
    dist = (dx * dx + dy * dy) ** 0.5
    return dist < 0.3

features.name: robot_far_from_target_center_l2_1.0
features.source:
def f6(s, a):
    target_cx = s[9] + s[17] / 2.0
    target_cy = s[10] + s[18] / 2.0
    dx = s[0] - target_cx
    dy = s[1] - target_cy
    dist = (dx * dx + dy * dy) ** 0.5
    return dist > 1.0

features.name: robot_manhattan_dist_to_target_lt_0.5
features.source:
def f7(s, a):
    target_cx = s[9] + s[17] / 2.0
    target_cy = s[10] + s[18] / 2.0
    dx = abs(s[0] - target_cx)
    dy = abs(s[1] - target_cy)
    return dx + dy < 0.5

features.name: robot_manhattan_dist_to_target_gt_2.0
features.source:
def f8(s, a):
    target_cx = s[9] + s[17] / 2.0
    target_cy = s[10] + s[18] / 2.0
    dx = abs(s[0] - target_cx)
    dy = abs(s[1] - target_cy)
    return dx + dy > 2.0

features.name: robot_in_obstacle1_zone
robot_y_aligned_with_obstacle1_gap
robot_clear_of_obstacle0_by_0.1
features.source:
def f19(s, a):
    ox = s[19]
    oy = s[20]
    ow = s[27]
    oh = s[28]
    rx = s[0]
    ry = s[1]
    r = s[3]
    closest_x = min(max(rx, ox), ox + ow)
    closest_y = min(max(ry, oy), oy + oh)
    dist = ((rx - closest_x) ** 2 + (ry - closest_y) ** 2) ** 0.5
    return dist > r + 0.1

features.name: robot_clear_of_obstacle1_by_0.1
features.source:
def f20(s, a):
    ox = s[29]
    oy = s[30]
    ow = s[37]
    oh = s[38]
    rx = s[0]
    ry = s[1]
    r = s[3]
    closest_x = min(max(rx, ox), ox + ow)
    closest_y = min(max(ry, oy), oy + oh)
    dist = ((rx - closest_x) ** 2 + (ry - closest_y) ** 2) ** 0.5
    return dist > r + 0.1

features.name: action_moves_toward_target_center
features.source:
def f21(s, a):
    target_cx = s[9] + s[17] / 2.0
    target_cy = s[10] + s[18] / 2.0
    to_target_x = target_cx - s[0]
    to_target_y = target_cy - s[1]
    dot = to_target_x * a[0] + to_target_y * a[1]
    return dot > 0

features.name: action_moves_away_from_target_center
features.source:
def f22(s, a):
    target_cx = s[9] + s[17] / 2.0
    target_cy = s[10] + s[18] / 2.0
    to_target_x = target_cx - s[0]
    to_target_y = target_cy - s[1]
    dot = to_target_x * a[0] + to_target_y * a[1]
    return dot < 0

features.source:
def f23(s, a):

features.name: action_dx_negative

def f24(s, a):

features.name: action_dy_negative

def f26(s, a):

features.name: action_is_mostly_x
features.source:
def f29(s, a):
    return abs(a[0]) > abs(a[1])

features.name: action_is_mostly_y
features.source:
def f30(s, a):
    return abs(a[1]) > abs(a[0])

action_moves_toward_passage0_gap_center_y
features.source:
def f37(s, a):
    gap_lower = s[20] + s[28] + s[3]
    gap_upper = s[30] - s[38] - s[3]
    gap_center = (gap_lower + gap_upper) / 2.0
    to_gap = gap_center - s[1]
    return to_gap * a[1] > 0

    to_wall = wall_x - s[0]
    return to_wall * a[0] > 0

    r = s[3]
    dist = abs((s[0] + r) - wall_x)
    return dist < 0.05

features.name: robot_y_near_passage0_gap_center_0.1
features.source:
def f41(s, a):
    gap_lower = s[20] + s[28] + s[3]
    gap_upper = s[30] - s[38] - s[3]
    gap_center = (gap_lower + gap_upper) / 2.0
    return abs(s[1] - gap_center) < 0.1

def f42(s, a):

    gap_upper = s[30] - s[38] - s[3]
    gap_center = (gap_lower + gap_upper) / 2.0
    return abs(s[1] - gap_center) > 0.3

features.name: robot_before_passage0_wall_and_action_toward_wall
robot_y_not_aligned_and_action_toward_gap_center
features.source:
def f48(s, a):
    gap_lower = s[20] + s[28] + s[3]
    gap_upper = s[30] - s[38] - s[3]
    aligned = (s[1] >= gap_lower) and (s[1] <= gap_upper)
    gap_center = (gap_lower + gap_upper) / 2.0
    to_gap = gap_center - s[1]
    return (not aligned) and (to_gap * a[1] > 0)

features.name: robot_past_passage0_wall_and_action_toward_target
features.source:
def f49(s, a):
    wall_x = s[19]
    wall_w = s[27]
    r = s[3]
    past = s[0] - r > wall_x + wall_w
    target_cx = s[9] + s[17] / 2.0
    target_cy = s[10] + s[18] / 2.0
    to_target_x = target_cx - s[0]
    to_target_y = target_cy - s[1]
    dot = to_target_x * a[0] + to_target_y * a[1]
    return past and (dot > 0)

features.name: robot_inside_passage0_zone_and_action_mostly_y
robot_close_to_target_and_action_small
features.source:
def f51(s, a):
    target_cx = s[9] + s[17] / 2.0
    target_cy = s[10] + s[18] / 2.0
    dx = s[0] - target_cx
    dy = s[1] - target_cy
    dist = (dx * dx + dy * dy) ** 0.5
    mag = (a[0] * a[0] + a[1] * a[1]) ** 0.5
    return (dist < 0.3) and (mag < 0.02)

features.name: robot_far_from_target_and_action_large
features.source:
def f52(s, a):
    target_cx = s[9] + s[17] / 2.0
    target_cy = s[10] + s[18] / 2.0
    dx = s[0] - target_cx
    dy = s[1] - target_cy
    dist = (dx * dx + dy * dy) ** 0.5
    mag = (a[0] * a[0] + a[1] * a[1]) ** 0.5
    return (dist > 1.0) and (mag > 0.04)

features.name: robot_y_far_from_gap_center_and_action_toward_gap
features.source:
def f53(s, a):
    gap_lower = s[20] + s[28] + s[3]
    gap_upper = s[30] - s[38] - s[3]
    gap_center = (gap_lower + gap_upper) / 2.0
    offset = s[1] - gap_center
    to_gap = gap_center - s[1]
    return (abs(offset) > 0.3) and (to_gap * a[1] > 0)

features.name: robot_before_passage0_wall_and_action_mostly_x
robot_inside_target_and_action_small
features.source:
def f55(s, a):
    target_x = s[9]
    target_y = s[10]
    target_w = s[17]
    target_h = s[18]
    inside = (s[0] >= target_x) and (s[0] <= target_x + target_w) and (s[1] >= target_y) and (s[1] <= target_y + target_h)
    mag = (a[0] * a[0] + a[1] * a[1]) ** 0.5
    return inside and (mag < 0.02)

features.name: robot_outside_target_and_action_toward_target
features.source:
def f56(s, a):
    target_x = s[9]
    target_y = s[10]
    target_w = s[17]
    target_h = s[18]
    inside = (s[0] >= target_x) and (s[0] <= target_x + target_w) and (s[1] >= target_y) and (s[1] <= target_y + target_h)
    target_cx = s[9] + s[17] / 2.0
    target_cy = s[10] + s[18] / 2.0
    to_target_x = target_cx - s[0]
    to_target_y = target_cy - s[1]
    dot = to_target_x * a[0] + to_target_y * a[1]
    return (not inside) and (dot > 0)
